name: default
description: JSON sibling of the flowchart template: the graph as machine-readable data — a node list and a directed-edge list. The agent expands the nodes[]/edges[] arrays from the __SLOT__ exemplar entries.

slots.description: Graph nodes; expand the exemplar object per node.
Directed edges; expand the exemplar object per edge.

shape.node[]: { id: string, label: string, kind: enum[process,terminal,decision,ok,bad] }
shape.edge[]: { from: string, to: string, label: string (optional) }
